name: om-packages
description: Canonical monorepo for reusable Orthodox Metrics packages under the @om namespace.

scripts.validate:tokens: corepack pnpm --filter @om/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens validate:phase1a
scripts.generate:tokens: corepack pnpm --filter @om/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens generate:artifacts
scripts.check:tokens: corepack pnpm --filter @om/contracts build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens validate:phase1a && corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens generate:artifacts && corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens validate:artifacts && corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens check:artifacts
scripts.storybook: corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/ui build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/storybook storybook
scripts.storybook:build: corepack pnpm --filter @om/tokens build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/ui build && corepack pnpm --filter @om/storybook storybook:build
